headline: Honeywell Aerospace Separation Clears Key Milestone with Board Approval
summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio: Top 10 Stocks to Buy According to Reddit. On June 15, Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) announced that its Board of Directors had officially approved the planned spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace. The decision marks a major milestone in the separation process, which remains on track […]
